title: CareShield Life
text:
CareShield Life - SupportGoWhere
CareShield Life
Share link
Provides basic financial support for Singapore Citizens and Permanent Residents with severe disability, especially during old age and need long-term care.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Monthly payout for 2026 is $689 and increases over time
Apply through AIC's eService Portal (eFASS)
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Lifetime cash payouts as long as you have severe disability

Monthly payout for 2026 is $689 and increases annually until age 67 or upon successful claim, whichever is earlier

Who is this for?

Singapore Citizens or Permanent Residents who are CareShield Life policyholders

Assessed by an MOH-accredited severe disability assessor to be unable to perform 3 out of the following 6 Activities of Daily Living (ADLs):

Washing

Dressing

Feeding

Toileting

Walking or moving around

Transferring

How to apply?

Contact an MOH-accredited severe disability assessor for a severe disability assessment. See list of assessors.

Log in to AIC’s eService portal (eFASS) with your Singpass to submit a claim application

Where can I find help?

View more details

CPF Hotline: 1800-227-1188

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Note: By appointment only

Scheme last updated 07 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
